HomeHeader.description: Let’s be real: <bold>AI is already writing the code you’re trying to learn.</bold> While you’re dreaming of a six-figure salary, the market is preparing you for <bold>minimum wage entry roles</bold>. We skip the fluff. From the drudgery of <bold>QA Fundamentals</bold> to the math-heavy hell of <bold>Three.js</bold>, this is a survival guide for the <italic>Post-Junior era</italic>.<block>Build what machines cannot imagine, or get replaced by a prompt.</block>

Footer.description: A project by <bold>Wiktor EXY. Kowalczyk</bold>. Built with <italic>Next.js</italic> and <italic>GSAP</italic>.

NotFound.description: The route you are trying to access does not exist in this reality. Either the URL is a hallucination, or we haven't engineered this path yet.

qa.label: 01. Quality Assurance
qa.quote: "It's not about finding bugs. It's about being the only person in the room brave enough to ruin everyone's mood."
qa.description: The reality of QA is 80% detective work on a bug that no one else can reproduce, and 20% fighting for quality.

frontend.label: 02. Frontend Development
frontend.quote: "You are a sapper in the minefield of browsers. A single margin in Safari can blow up your entire Grid."
frontend.description: Frontend is an eternal struggle between the designer's vision, API limitations, and the reality of cross-browser compatibility.

threeD.label: 03. 3D & WebGL
threeD.quote: "In 3D, debugging is pure geometry. If you mess up a vector, your object simply ceases to exist in our reality."
threeD.description: Matrices, quaternions, and shaders are the only things standing between a blank screen and a photorealistic world.

reality.label: Final Chapter: Reality Check
reality.dreamQuote: "You will build innovative products and change the world in a modern office."
reality.realityQuote: "You will debug code written 5 years ago and explain why the estimate was wrong."
